name: @type1skills/skill-matrix
description: Static skill observability plugin for usage, outcomes, runtime, and token consumption per Type1Skills skill.

commands.name: type1skills skill-matrix snapshot
commands.description: Build .type1skills/skill-matrix/snapshot.json from skill history and token budget ledgers.

commands.name: type1skills skill-matrix open
commands.description: Open the static skill matrix dashboard for the latest snapshot.
